programs.name: Dallas Water Utilities ICI Rebate Program
programs.description: Up to $100,000 per project for commercial/industrial customers
programs.eligibility: Commercial and industrial water customers in Dallas Water Utilities service area

programs.name: Texas Water-Efficient Products Sales Tax Exemption
programs.description: 6.25% state + up to 2% local sales tax avoided on qualifying water-efficient equipment
programs.eligibility: All qualifying rainwater harvesting and water-efficient equipment in Texas

programs.name: Water Conservation Property Tax Exemption (§11.32)
programs.description: 0%–100% of approved assessed value, dependent on local taxing-unit adoption
programs.eligibility: Case-by-case — depends on local taxing-unit adoption

programs.name: Chapter 312 Tax Abatement
programs.description: Modeled on Grundfos CBS Brookshire: 60% abatement for 10 years. ~$146,500/yr county savings on $43.9M project
programs.eligibility: Industrial and manufacturing facilities — county dependent

programs.name: Texas Enterprise Zone Program
programs.description: State sales/use tax refund caps ranging $625K–$3.75M by project tier
programs.eligibility: Based on building scale and estimated qualified jobs/spending

programs.name: Texas Enterprise Fund
programs.description: $1,000–$10,000 per qualified job grant for manufacturing and industrial facilities
programs.eligibility: Manufacturing and industrial facilities creating qualified jobs

programs.name: Freeport Exemption
programs.description: Up to 100% property tax exemption on qualifying inventory shipped within 175 days
programs.eligibility: Logistics and distribution buildings with qualifying inventory

notes: Comprehensive Texas incentive stack with verified state and city programs
